actions.name: create_company
actions.description: Create a HubSpot company with the provided properties and optional associations.

properties.description: HubSpot properties keyed by property name.

associations.description: Association definitions to create alongside the record.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

properties.description: HubSpot properties keyed by property name.

propertiesWithHistory.description: HubSpot property histories keyed by property name.

associations.description: Associations returned by HubSpot when requested.

record.description: HubSpot CRM record returned by the MCP server.

actions.name: list_properties
actions.description: List or search HubSpot property definitions for an MCP-supported object type.

keywords.description: Keywords used to search matching property definitions.

propertyNames.description: Specific property names to fetch when a full definition is needed.

items.description: HubSpot property definition returned by the MCP server.

properties.description: Property definitions returned for the requested object type.

actions.name: manage_crm_objects
actions.description: Create or update HubSpot CRM records or activities through the MCP server.

properties.description: HubSpot properties keyed by property name.

associations.description: Association definitions to create alongside the record.

recordId.description: HubSpot record identifier for update operations.

properties.description: HubSpot properties keyed by property name.

idProperty.description: Alternate unique property name that should resolve the record ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action. Unknown fields are passed through to the HubSpot MCP tool.

result.description: Raw response payload returned by the HubSpot MCP tool.
